breakdown: The code demonstrates strong naming conventions and architecture with clear separation between configuration and business logic. Type safety is solid with dataclasses and proper typing, though no tests are visible in this diff despite references to testing capabilities. Error handling uses fallbacks gracefully but the tuple-based success pattern (returning True even in fallback cases) is potentially confusing. Documentation excels with WHY explanations throughout.
reasoning: The implementation is production-ready in structure but incomplete—error handling block is truncated mid-explanation ('# WHY: Log stderr for debugging but'), and no test files are present despite the PR being a chore. The docstrings and comments are excellent quality, but the absence of test coverage significantly impacts the score given the 15% weighting.
